a.xlink:title: Common base for Phase and Pass.
All Passes that want to be registered in the PassMan must implement this interface.
As opposed to a Pass, a Phase does one thing at a time and does not mix with other Phases.
Simple Stage that searches for a pattern and replaces it.
An optimizer that combines several optimizations in an optimal way.
Inherit from this class using CRTP, if your Pass does not need state and a fixed-point iteration.
Optimistically performs β-reduction (aka inlining).
Performs η-expansion: f -> λx.f x, if f is a Lam with more than one user and does not appear in calle...
Performs η-reduction.
Inherit from this class using CRTP, if you do need a Pass with a state and a fixed-point.
This FPPass is similar to sparse conditional constant propagation (SCCP).
SSA construction algorithm that promotes slots, loads, and stores to SSA values.
Perform Scalarization (= Argument simplification).
This pass is the heart of AD.
Resolves lowering of high level operations into medium/other high-level operations.
In this step, we lower map_reduce operations into affine for loops making the iteration scheme explic...
The general idea of this Pass is to change the shape of signatures of functions.
This Phase will recursively Rewriter::rewrite.
Transitively visits all reachable, closed mutables in the World.
Wraps a PassMan pipeline as a Phase.
Organizes several Phases in a a pipeline.
Rewrites the RWPhase::old_world into the RWPhase::new_world and swaps them afterwards.
Performs typed closure conversion.
This pass lowers typed closures to untyped closures.
Rewrite direct.cps2ds to cps.
This phase adds mems to all lambdas and continuations.
Like ClosedMutPhase but computes a Nest for each NestPhase::visit.
Inlines in post-order all Lams that occur exactly once in the program.
Inlines in post-order all Lams that occur exactly once in the program.
Removes unreachable and dead code by rebuilding the whole World into a new one and swapping them afte...
This phase takes care that Lamdas appear either only in callee position (Known) or not (Unknown).
Inlines in post-order all Lams that occur exactly once in the program.
Symbolic Expression Optimization.
Lowers the for axm to actual control flow in CPS.
Converts direct style function to cps functions.
